title: scrophularia bheriensis
intro: Scrophularia bheriensis, also known as Bheriens' figwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Scrophularia bheriensis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, fever, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia bheriensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
